# Regen Business Labs

> A privately funded 90-day community pilot building real economic bridges between locals and expats in South Pacific Costa Rica.

Regen Business Labs is an initiative founded by Rick Broider, a systems strategist and community architect based in Ojochal, Costa Rica. The initiative addresses the growing economic divide between long-term expat residents and the local Tico community in the Ojochal, Uvita, and Dominical area of South Pacific Costa Rica (also known as Costa Ballena and Bahía Ballena).

## The Problem

Two economic worlds are forming in one of Costa Rica's most beloved coastal regions. Expats and locals share the same beaches, markets, and surf breaks — but operate in separate economic realities. Without deliberate intervention, this divide hardens into parallel communities with little genuine economic integration.

## The Initiative

A 90-day professionally facilitated pilot program. Budget: $12,000. Scope: bilingual business workshops, regenerative business development, founder roundtables, and cross-cultural economic infrastructure. Funded by a small group of aligned private patrons — expats, family stewards, and regenerative builders — who care about the long-term health of this region.

## Who This Serves

- Long-term expat residents of Ojochal, Uvita, Dominical, and the South Pacific Costa Rica coast
- Families raising children in the region who want genuine community integration
- Regenerative entrepreneurs and land stewards seeking catalytic community infrastructure
- Local Costa Rican families and entrepreneurs (Tico community)

## Founder

Rick Broider — systems strategist, community architect, QuickLaunch Consulting. Based in Ojochal, Costa Rica.

## Partner Organization

Happiness Project Ojochal — a volunteer-ethos community organization in the region providing hosting and community alignment.

## Geography

Ojochal · Uvita · Dominical · South Pacific Costa Rica · Costa Ballena · Bahía Ballena · Puntarenas Province, Costa Rica

## Funding Model

Private patronage. $12,000 total for 90 days. No financial return. The return is a healthier, more economically coherent community. Founding supporter spots are limited.

## Contact

Website: https://regenbusinesslabs.com/
Inquiry: https://regenbusinesslabs.com/#cta
